\tzpentry{ID5499}{Quantum State Expansion}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5499 introduces Quantum State Expansion as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \Psi(r,\theta,\phi,t)=\sum_{\ell,m,n} A_{\ell mn}\, j_\ell(k_{\ell n}r)\,Y_{\ell m}(\theta,\phi)\cos(\omega t+\varphi_{\ell mn}), \label{eq:spherical_superposition} \end{equation}
